rows.requirement: Deterministic regression test for repairEmptyLeafAtParent orphan-guard (left sibling splits concurrently, not yet linked into parent)
rows.mechanism: prePropagateHook forces the exact race window deterministically; test asserts retry=true and full latch release
rows.mutation_tested: yes: reverted delete.go's fix (duplicated store.Unlock(leftID), matching pre-fix commit b31328f state) -> test reproduces fatal error: sync: unlock of unlocked mutex deterministically; restored fix -> test passes

rows.requirement: Deterministic regression test for leaf/internal split publish-last ordering (Tree.Lookup must never observe a not-yet-written new node pointer)
rows.mechanism: splitPublishHook forces a pause at the exact publish boundary; test directly asserts store.ReadNode(newChildID) succeeds at that point
rows.mutation_tested: yes: temporarily reversed insert.go's leaf-split write order -> test reproduces the exact EOF read failure (btree: reading node N at offset ...: EOF) deterministically; restored fix (byte-identical to backup, verified via diff) -> test passes

rows.requirement: No regressions to existing engine/btree suite
rows.mechanism: full suite run after all changes
